findings.description: The HTML output example is truncated. The source shows 5 radio button inputs (nablarch_radio1 through nablarch_radio5, values 001–005: red, blue, green, yellow, pink), but the knowledge file only includes the first 3 (nablarch_radio1 through nablarch_radio3). The entries for nablarch_radio4 (004:yellow) and nablarch_radio5 (005:pink) are omitted.
